description: A stadium (oblong/slot) shaped plate, 60mm long in X, 20mm wide in Y, and 8mm thick in Z, centered on the XY origin and lying flat on the XY plane (Z from 0 to 8).
notes: To construct this shape, create a 2D sketch of a stadium/slot centered at the origin (0, 0) with a total length of 60mm and a width of 20mm (made of a 40mm x 20mm rectangle and two 10mm radius semicircles on the sides). Extrude this sketch along the Z axis from Z=0 to Z=8.
